Title: ThinkLLM — Think through your LLM choices

URL Source: https://thinkllm.dev/

Markdown Content:
Start here to find models that fit your task

### [Agentic Tasks 207 models Multi-step tasks requiring planning, tool use, and self-correction Research a topic and compile a structured report Browse the web to complete a booking task](https://thinkllm.dev/use-cases/agentic_tasks)### [Coding Assistant 466 models Writing, reviewing, debugging, and explaining code in a development workflow Generate a REST endpoint from a description Review a PR and suggest improvements](https://thinkllm.dev/use-cases/coding_assistant)### [Content Creation 589 models Generating marketing copy, articles, social posts, and creative content Write a product description for an e-commerce listing Draft a blog post outline and first draft](https://thinkllm.dev/use-cases/content_creation)### [Customer Support 518 models Handling customer inquiries following product policies and tone guidelines Answer a billing question using a policy document Escalate a complaint with the correct tone](https://thinkllm.dev/use-cases/customer_support)### [Data Analysis 421 models Interpreting data, writing analysis code, and explaining findings Write a pandas script to clean and aggregate a CSV Explain what a regression output means](https://thinkllm.dev/use-cases/data_analysis)### [Local Deployment 1365 models Running open-weight models on local hardware — privacy, cost, or offline use Self-hosted chatbot on consumer GPU Offline inference for sensitive data](https://thinkllm.dev/use-cases/local_deployment)### [RAG & Retrieval 723 models Answering questions grounded in a retrieved document corpus Answer questions from internal documentation Summarize relevant sections of a PDF](https://thinkllm.dev/use-cases/rag_retrieval)### [Research Synthesis 448 models Reading, summarizing, and connecting information across multiple sources Summarize the key findings of 5 papers on a topic Compare two competing theories](https://thinkllm.dev/use-cases/research_synthesis)

### [Coding 836 models Code generation, debugging, explanation, and refactoring Generate working functions from specs Debug a failing test](https://thinkllm.dev/capabilities/coding)### [Creative Writing 917 models Creative, narrative, and stylistic text generation Write a short story with a specific tone and structure Generate marketing copy in a brand voice](https://thinkllm.dev/capabilities/creative_writing)### [Factual Knowledge 1111 models World knowledge accuracy, recall of facts and relationships Answer factual questions about history, science, geography Recall accurate dates, names, and relationships](https://thinkllm.dev/capabilities/factual_knowledge)### [Instruction Following 1099 models Adhering to complex, structured, or constrained instructions Follow a multi-step formatting template exactly Respect negative constraints (do not mention X)](https://thinkllm.dev/capabilities/instruction_following)### [Long Context 1037 models Performance retention over long documents and conversations Answer questions about a 100-page document Maintain consistent character over a long conversation](https://thinkllm.dev/capabilities/long_context)### [Multilingual 934 models Quality of non-English language understanding and generation Answer questions in French, Spanish, Chinese, etc.Translate with idiomatic accuracy](https://thinkllm.dev/capabilities/multilingual)### [Multimodal 328 models Quality of vision, audio, and image understanding (distinct from modality support) Describe the contents of a complex image Interpret charts and diagrams accurately](https://thinkllm.dev/capabilities/multimodal)### [Reasoning & Logic 917 models Multi-step reasoning, logic puzzles, mathematical problem-solving Multi-step math word problems Deductive and inductive logic puzzles](https://thinkllm.dev/capabilities/reasoning)### [Tool Use 512 models Function calling, structured output, agent-style tool orchestration Call the right API tool with correct parameters Chain multiple tool calls to complete a task](https://thinkllm.dev/capabilities/tool_use)
